Hello! My name is Zac.

I am a Student at the University of Virginia in my 4th Year of studying Computer Science.

Discovering my interest in Computer Science I have done Research with professors on Grounds, done projects with friends, and have personally taken the time to explore new topics. Take a look at my Projects for a showcase of what I have done and some of what I have learned.

I sometimes stumble onto something interesting and feel the need to write about it. You can gain some insight into who I am from my Blog.

University of Virginia

School of Engineering and Applied Sciences (SEAS)

I am currently a 3rd Year Bachelors of Science in Computer Science and Bachelors of Arts in Mathematics
